signals.headline: WISCONSIN SUPREME COURT ELECTION: High Early Turnout Signals Close Race** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
signals.raw:
WISCONSIN SUPREME COURT ELECTION: High Early Turnout Signals Close Race** | YES | MEDIUM confidence

Early voting is surging ahead of the April 7 Wisconsin Supreme Court election, with turnout already exceeding last autumn's early voting levels[2]. Republicans see positive signs despite being vastly outraised by Democrats[2], as control of the court's majority remains at stake[2].

CALIFORNIA GOVERNOR'S RACE: Republicans Reject Trump Endorsement** | YES | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: GEORGIA SPECIAL ELECTION: Trump-Backed Fuller Advances** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
GEORGIA SPECIAL ELECTION: Trump-Backed Fuller Advances** | YES | HIGH confidence

Republican **Clay Fuller**, endorsed by Trump, advanced to an April 7 runoff to fill Marjorie Taylor Greene's vacant House seat[2]. Fuller faced Democrat Shawn Harris in the early March special election and is considered the clear frontrunner, expected to consolidate Republican votes[2].

signals.raw:
CALIFORNIA DEMOCRATIC FIELD NARROWS** | YES | HIGH confidence

Former State Controller **Betty Yee suspended her campaign** for California governor today (April 21), citing fundraising struggles and limited voter traction[3]. The field now includes 60 total candidates with 2 Republican and 6 Democratic primary candidates[3].
